site.title: Ulvi Damirli
site.description: Software Engineer who loves to design and build digital products.

home.hero: Hey, I'm Ulvi! A Senior Software Engineer based in France.

bio.intro: I'm a Senior Software Engineer based in Toulouse, France.
bio.focus: Most of my work is around tech leadership, backend systems, frontend, cloud infrastructure, and data platforms.
bio.philosophy: I like working on problems where code is only one part of the equation. The ones where backend, product, data, operations, and business context all matter.
bio.careAbout: A few areas I care about:
bio.interests: I'm especially interested in startups, AI-assisted engineering, and how small senior teams can build better systems with less noise.
bio.personal: Outside work, I'm into board games, swimming, gaming, travel, and trying new things.
bio.future: I'm planning to share more about high-traffic systems, startups, AI-assisted development, and the reality of building systems in small teams.

posts.title: Posts
posts.metaDescription: Software Engineer who loves to design and build digital products.

projects.title: Projects
projects.metaDescription: Selected projects built and designed by Ulvi Damirli.

about.metaDescription: Software Engineer who loves to design and build digital products from scratch to production.
about.lead: I love to design and build digital products from scratch to production.
about.intro: Building, designing and helping companies create digital products is what I've been doing for the last 8 years working as a Software Engineer.
about.domains: Team leadership, Product Development, Fullstack Web Development, REST API, Data modeling, SQL & NoSQL, Kubernetes, Cloud, Serverless Architecture, Data mining (scraping), ETL and Test Automation.
